calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mark Rubke appearing for and with executor Gwen Haynie Metcalf. Clinton Killian appearing for and with objector Cheryl Haynie Maillet. Mr. Killian still have the same objections. Court is taking this matter under submission.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Continued To Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Rubke appearing for and with personal reapresentative Gwen Haynie Metcalf. Clinton Killian appearing for and with Cheryl Haynie Maillet. Mr. Killian objected to not receiving a copy of the amended accounting. Court agreed that Mr. Killian is entitled to 15 days notice. Matter is continued to 1/29. Mr. Killian received a copy of the amended accounting from Mr. Rubke in open court. Mr. Rubke will re-serve all the documents to Mr. Killian and filed a POS.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Continued To Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Continued To Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Continued To Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Continued To Nov-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Continued To Oct-23-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Rubke appearing for and with personal representative Gwen Haynie Metcalf. Clinton Killian appearing for Cheryl Haynie-Maillet. The bank account issue is not resolved. Ms. Metcalf collected the funds as a surviving joint tenant. Mr. Killian did not get an accounting of those funds. Mr. Rubke said he gave copies of canceled checks to Mr. Killian during the last hearing. He will send him another copy. The Wells Fargo account issue is reserved. Court wants Ms. Metcalf to include the Wells Fargo funds as part of the accounting. She is to indicate the funds received Wells Fargo account and disbursement of those funds. Matter is continued to 10/23. If the accounting and petition for final distribution is filed and a hearing date set, the 10/23 hearing will be continued to the same date. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: CLinton Killian appearing for and with Cheryl Haynie-Maillet. Mark Rubke appearing for and with Gwen Haynie Metcalf. Mr. Rubke informs the Court that Ms. Metcalf has signed her declaration this morning. Court questions Ms. Metcalf on what authority she used to collect the Wells Fargo accounts. She said she collected the funds as a joint tenant. Mr. Killian argued that he was told by Wells Fargo that she used Letters of Testamentary. He is waiting for proof from the bank. Court wants to know what was the value of the insurance policy that was assigned to the mortuary and how many policy and what was in the safe deposit box. Counsel will file a supplemental declaration to address all the remaining issues. Matter is continued to 10/2. If the executor has misuesd her powers, Court will consider surcharging her. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Continued To Aug-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Rubke appearing for and with Gwen Haynie. Clinaton Killian appearing for and with Cheryl Haynie Maillet. Court has not seen the response filed on 7/21. Mr. Rubke has received a copy of the response. Mr. Killian is unable to get the documents from the bank and the insurance company on how the funds were released. He will subpeona the records from the bank and the insurance company. Court wants the administrator to file a formal declaration stating what was in the house and where it went. A lists of items that she claims of her own. The house has been sold. Court wants parties to discuss settlement. To compel filing of inventory is moot. Matter is continued to 8/28. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Continued To Jul-25-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Clinton Killian appearing for petitioner. Mark Rubke appearing for personal representative. Both counsel agree to a continuance. Matter is continued to 7/25 at 11am. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Clinton Killian appearing for petitioner. Mark Rubke appearing for personal representative. The Inventory and Appraisal was sent to the probate referee on 4/22 according to Mr. Rubke. The house is listed for sale and an offer was received. Court wants Mr. Rubke to file a formal response to the claim of other personal properties. Mr. Killian objects to not receiving any notice regarding the sale of the real property. That issue is not before the court today. Request for special notice was filed by Patricia Simmons. Mr. Killian has not heard from Ms. Simmons. Mr. Rubke agrees to sharing escrow documents with Mr. Killian. Matter is continued to 7/10. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Compel The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal, Filing Of Accounting, Or In The Alternative Issuance Of A Citation, Removal Of Gwen Haynie Metcalf As Executor, Appointment Of Cheryl Hynie-Maillet As Executor
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
